Purpose: DRAFT (TEL-PROFILE) — mandatory Redfish resources and properties per ADC asset class. A bridge endpoint must satisfy this profile (via Redfish-Interop-Validator) before the Telemetry OS trusts it. Derived from MGN-TEL-001 §2.4/§4-§6 and exercised by the twin mockup in system/twin/redfish/.

Chassis.Purpose: Genset, BESS, switchgear, and rack chassis

Oem.Purpose: ADC Engine / Aftertreatment / GridForming blocks pending TEL-002 Oem dictionary

ConditionalRequirements.Purpose: Genset positions: run-state, run-hours (compliance-critical), and electrical output sensors are mandatory regardless of engine OEM (CTRL-002 abstraction)
BESS: signed PCS real power with PeakIntervalReading/LowestIntervalReading, SoC, and grid-forming mode are mandatory — the bridge metric of MGN-TEL-001 §4.2

PeakIntervalReading.Purpose: Mandatory on BESS ±P, bus frequency, genset kW, GPU power (transient capture, Sensor v1.12.0)

Redundancy.Purpose: Redundancy v1.7.0 MinNumNeededForFaultTolerance must carry the real N+1 number (4-of-5)

SecondaryCoolantConnectors.Purpose: One per TCS rack branch; supply/return T, flow, ΔP

LeakDetection.Purpose: 3-zone rope into the CDU PLC; LeakDetector v1.6.0 V/I recommended

SpeedControlPercent.Purpose: Supervisory setpoint surface — PLC enforces limits

ConditionalRequirements.Purpose: GPU power, utilization, junction temp, and power-limit/throttle state are mandatory reads — they are the CAUSE signals of the §10 correlation

MetricReportDefinitions.Purpose: One periodic report per cadence class B/C/D (MGN-TEL-001 §9)

Subscriptions.Purpose: Must deliver: leak, redundancy-loss, pair-reversal + dew-point (Environmental v1.5.0), chassis power-limit (Power v1.3.0), ManagerEvent, ResourceEvent

OpenItems: TEL-002: genset Oem/Engine + Oem/Aftertreatment property dictionary — converts the Oem 'Recommended' entries above to Mandatory with named properties
TEL-PROFILE: validate this draft against Redfish-Interop-Validator syntax once a Python-capable host is available (machine constraint: no Python on the authoring workstation)
EMIS-OEM: emissions property names pending; compliance historian mirrors Class D regardless
